recommendations.title: Europa Report
recommendations.overview: A crew of international astronauts are sent on a private mission to Jupiter's fourth moon.

recommendations.title: Moon Man
recommendations.overview: Working as a maintenance crew member on the moon, Duguyue is left behind after the evacuation mission forgets about him. A meteorite then destroys planet Earth, leaving him as the only man left alive in existence.

recommendations.title: Rampage: President Down
recommendations.overview: Bill Williamson is back, alive and well and doing a recon mission around D.C. This time he wants to cause a major population disruption within the USA which result in devastating consequences reverberating throughout the world. His new mission this t

recommendations.title: Dave
recommendations.overview: A sweet-natured Temp Agency operator and amateur Presidential look-alike is recruited by the Secret Service to become a temporary stand-in for the President of the United States.

recommendations.title: Shooter
recommendations.overview: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes horribly awry and disappears, living in seclusion. He is coaxed back into service after a high-profile government official convinces him to help thwart a plot to kill the

recommendations.title: Brake
recommendations.overview: A Secret Service Agent is held captive in the trunk of a car and endures high-speed mental and physical torture as terrorists attempt to extract needed information for their sinister plot.

recommendations.title: Moonfall
recommendations.overview: A mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit around Earth and sends it hurtling on a collision course with life as we know it.

recommendations.title: Iron Man
recommendations.overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

recommendations.title: Outland
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Thriller, Crime, Western
recommendations.overview: On the sunless moon Io, Marshall William T. O’Niel goes toe-to-toe with the corrupt manager of a mining colony and his gang of roughnecks while investigating a rash of worker suicides.

recommendations.title: Non Negotiable
recommendations.overview: Hostage negotiator Alan Bender is called to rescue the president from a kidnapping, only to find himself also mediating to save his wife and marriage.
